color.description: Food colorants — natural and synthetic pigments that give color to food products

preservative.description: Substances that inhibit microbial growth and extend shelf life

antioxidant.description: Substances that prevent oxidation and rancidity in fats and oils

sweetener.description: Substances that sweeten food with fewer calories than sugar, or zero calories

flavor.description: Substances that enhance or modify the taste and aroma of food

emulsifier.description: Substances that help mix oil and water phases in food

thickener.description: Substances that increase viscosity and give body to food products

acidity.description: Substances that regulate acidity or alkalinity of food

other.description: Miscellaneous additives including anti-caking agents, gases, coating agents, enzymes
